ch_001:
title: Pass-the-Hash Detection
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 4624
        LogonType:
            - 3
            - 9
        AuthenticationPackageName: NTLM
    filter1:
        WorkstationName: LEGACY-PRINT-01
    filter2:
        SubjectUserName: svc_breakglass
    condition: selection and not (filter1 or filter2)
level: high
ch_002:
title: Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 4698
        TaskContent|contains:
            - '-enc'
            - '-EncodedCommand'
            - 'mshta.exe'
            - 'rundll32.exe'
            - 'javascript:'
    filter1:
        TaskName: '\IT\Audit'
    filter2:
        TaskName: '\System\Backup'
    condition: selection and not (filter1 or filter2)
level: high
ch_003:
title: LSASS Access - Credential Dumping
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: sysmon
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 10
        TargetImage|endswith: '\\lsass.exe'
        GrantedAccess: '0x1010'
    filter1:
        SourceImage: 'C:\Windows\System32\Taskmgr.exe'
    filter2:
        SourceImage: 'C:\Program Files\Windows Defender\MsMpEng.exe'
    condition: selection and not (filter1 or filter2)
level: critical
ch_004:
title: Encoded PowerShell Command
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: sysmon
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 1
        Image|endswith: '\\powershell.exe'
        CommandLine|contains:
            - '-enc'
            - '-EncodedCommand'
            - '-e '
    filter1:
        ParentImage: 'C:\Windows\CCM\CcmExec.exe'
    filter2:
        User: hr_admin
    condition: selection and not (filter1 or filter2)
level: high
ch_005:
title: SQL Injection Attempt
status: experimental
logsource:
    category: webserver
detection:
    selection:
        URI|contains:
            - 'UNION SELECT'
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "' OR '1'='1"
            - '--'
    filter1:
        IP: '10.0.99.100'
    filter2:
        UserAgent: 'AdminApp/1.0'
    condition: selection and not (filter1 or filter2)
level: high
ch_006:
title: Malicious Service Installation
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 7045
        ServiceFileName|contains:
            - '\Temp\'
            - '\AppData\'
            - 'powershell -enc'
    filter1:
        ServiceName: IT_Audit_Agent
    filter2:
        ServiceName: Corp_Backup_Svc
    condition: selection and not (filter1 or filter2)
level: high
ch_007:
title: Suspicious Service Account Interactive Logon
status: experimental
logsource:
    product: windows
    service: security
detection:
    selection:
        EventID: 4624
        LogonType: 2
        TargetUserName|contains: svc_
    filter1:
        TargetUserName: svc_breakglass
    filter2:
        WorkstationName: CONSOLE-STAGING-01
    condition: selection and not (filter1 or filter2)
level: medium
